nasb.text: He walked in the way of the house of Ahab and did evil in the sight of the Lord, like the house of Ahab had done, because he was a son-in-law of the house of Ahab.

esv.text: He also walked in the way of the house of Ahab and did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, as the house of Ahab had done, for he was son-in-law to the house of Ahab.

cnv.text: 他照著亞哈家的道路而行，行耶和華看為惡的事，好像亞哈家一樣，因為他是亞哈家的女婿。

ccb.text: 亚哈谢是亚哈家的女婿，他步亚哈家的后尘，做耶和华视为恶的事。
